title: Neurocritical Care
subtitle: Specialized intensive care for acute neurological emergencies and brain disorders
approachText: Our neurocritical care team provides specialized intensive care for patients with acute neurological emergencies. Multiple CCPSA physicians hold board certification in Neurocritical Care, offering expert management of complex neurological conditions in the ICU setting.

conditions.title: Acute Ischemic & Hemorrhagic Stroke
conditions.description: Intensive management of acute cerebrovascular events.

conditions.title: Traumatic Brain Injury
conditions.description: Expert care for severe head injuries and complications.

conditions.title: Spinal Cord Injury
conditions.description: Acute care and stabilization of spinal injuries.

conditions.title: Neuromuscular Respiratory Failure
conditions.description: Management of Guillain-Barre, myasthenia gravis, and related conditions.

conditions.title: Brain Tumor Complications
conditions.description: Critical care for acute tumor-related emergencies.

conditions.title: Post-Neurosurgical Care
conditions.description: Intensive monitoring and management after brain surgery.

capabilities.title: Continuous EEG Monitoring
capabilities.description: 24/7 brain activity monitoring and seizure detection.

capabilities.title: Family & Goals of Care
capabilities.description: Compassionate communication and advance care planning.

ctaText: Contact us today to learn more about our neurocritical care services and schedule your consultation.
